headline: Agilent Showcases Cancer Research Solutions at AACR 2026
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., April 15, 2026--Agilent Technologies Inc. (NYSE: A) will present new technologies, scientific collaborations, and integrated workflows supporting cancer research and diagnostics at the American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting on April 17–22, 2026, in San Diego, California. At the meeting, Agilent will highlight advances designed to connect discovery research, translational science, and companion diagnostics development, reflecting the growing demand for
